title: Franky Is Targeted
description: Robin’s surrender is tied to the World Government’s threat against the crew, making her betrayal look more like a sacrifice.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this part follows Iceburg, Nico Nico Robin, Blueno, Nico Robin, Franky. Robin’s surrender is tied to the World Government’s threat against the crew, making her betrayal look more like a sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: You are no match for us.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Before you get blood all over it.

summary: Robin’s surrender is tied to the World Government’s threat against the crew, making her betrayal look more like a sacrifice.
